answer:
LiveAgent provides a built-in, remote Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that connects AI assistants to your helpdesk to automate workflows and query data. You can connect it to MCP-compatible clients like Claude Desktop, Cursor, or FlowHunt using the server URL: `https://YOUR_ACCOUNT.ladesk.com/public/api/mcp`.

The integration supports Streamable HTTP transport and two authentication methods:
- Bearer token: Generate an MCP access token in your LiveAgent profile and paste it into your client.
- OAuth 2.1: The client automatically handles the authorization flow via a consent screen.

Once connected, your AI tool gains access to 16 tools for managing tickets, contacts, agents, and departments. All actions are performed under your specific agent identity and remain subject to your existing role permissions.

results.title: LiveAgent MCP - Manage Support Tickets & CRM Data
What Is LiveAgent MCP? Exploring the Model Context Protocol and AI Integration
